text:
records or claim lines on a given claim have the same CLM_ID. It is used to link the 
revenue lines together and/or to the base claim. 
SHORT NAME: CLM_ID 
LONG NAME: CLM_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
15 
SOURCE: 
CCW 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
The CLM_ID is assigned by the CCW. The CLM_ID is specific to the CCW and is not applicable to any 
other identification system or data source. 
Limitation: When pulled directly from the CCW database, this is a numeric column.
